comments.comment_body: Hello Parisa! I am interested in the position. Please review my profile.
comments.post_body: Looking for C++ candidates who have developed debugger tools for CPU/GPU/FPGA and have a good understand of the Architecture of one of the above. If you or anyone you know is interested, please let me know.  We are hiring!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a job posting looking for C++ candidates with experience in developing debugger tools for various architectures. The original post is seeking referrals for a hiring opportunity.
